zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Waller於1500年出生在英國素瑞多爾金時，她的父親John Waller20歲，母親Sarah Dale20歲。她於1520年與William Parr在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1592年在英國英格蘭素瑞多爾金享年92歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Waller于1500年出生在英国素瑞多爾金时，她的父亲John Waller20岁，母亲Sarah Dale20岁。她于1520年与William Parr在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1592年在英国英格兰素瑞多爾金享年92岁。

nameMeanings.name: Waller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Waller was born in 1500, in Dorking, Surrey, England, her father, John Waller, was 20 and her mother, Sarah Dale, was 20. She married William Parr in 1520, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1592, in Dorking, Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 92.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Waller est née en 1500, à Dorking, Surrey, Angleterre, son père, John Waller, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Sarah Dale, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé William Parr en 1520, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1592, à Dorking, Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 92 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mary Waller 1500 in Dorking, Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Waller 20 und ihre Mutter Sarah Dale 20. Sie hat 1520 in England William Parr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1592 im Alter von 92 Jahren in Dorking, Surrey, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Waller è nata il nel 1500 nel Dorking, Surrey, England, sua padre, John Waller, aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Sarah Dale, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato William Parr nel 1520, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1592, nel Dorking, Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 92 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Waller(이)가 1500년 영국 수리 도르킨그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Waller(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Dale(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1520년 영국에서 William Parr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1592년 영국 잉글랜드 수리 도르킨그에서 92세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Waller nasceu em 1500, em Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Waller, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Dale, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com William Parr em 1520, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1592, em Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 92 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Waller родилась в 1500 г. в местности доркинг, сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени John Waller было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Sarah Dale, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Parr в 1520 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1592 г. в местности доркинг, сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 92 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mary Waller nació en 1500, en Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, John Waller, tenía 20 años y su mamá, Sarah Dale, tenía 20 años. Se casó con William Parr en 1520, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1592, en Dorking, Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 92 años.
